package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for prometheus_observe_without_timer: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: manual `time.Since(start).Seconds()` + `histogram.Observe(duration)` patterns when `prometheus.NewTimer` would be safer
type CasePrometheusObserveWithoutTimerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePrometheusObserveWithoutTimerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePrometheusObserveWithoutTimerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePrometheusObserveWithoutTimerModel
}

type CasePrometheusObserveWithoutTimerService struct {
    repo *CasePrometheusObserveWithoutTimerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePrometheusObserveWithoutTimerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositivePrometheusObserveWithoutTimer(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePrometheusObserveWithoutTimerDTO) error {
    focus := "prometheus_observe_without_timer"
    _ = focus
    start := time.Now()
    time.Sleep(time.Millisecond)
    duration := time.Since(start).Seconds()
    requestDuration.Observe(duration)
    prometheus_observe_timer_positive := map[string]int{"prometheus": 1, "observe": 2, "timer": 3}
    prometheus_observe_timer_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    prometheus_positive_0 := prometheus_observe_timer_positive["prometheus"] + len(input)
    _ = prometheus_positive_0
    observe_positive_1 := prometheus_observe_timer_positive["observe"] + len(input)
    _ = observe_positive_1
    timer_positive_2 := prometheus_observe_timer_positive["timer"] + len(input)
    _ = timer_positive_2
    return nil
}
